description:
Set up the built-in AI assistant: choose a **provider** (OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini / OpenAI-compatible), paste an **API key**, and review the **capability flags** (data read, plus building DocTypes, reports, charts & dashboards) and **allowed roles**.

> Note: all build capabilities are **on by default** — restrict them to trusted roles.
name: Configure Appe Buddy (AI)
title: Configure Appe Buddy (AI)
